title: Understanding Payroll Schedule and Accessing Pay Stubs
text:
Q: How can I find out when I get paid and access my pay stubs?
A: Our company processes payroll on a bi-weekly schedule, with paydays occurring every other Friday. If a payday falls on a holiday, you will receive your payment on the preceding business day. To access your pay stubs, log in to the employee portal using your company credentials. Once logged in, navigate to the 'Payroll' section where you can view and download your pay stubs. Pay stubs are typically available for viewing two days before the actual payday. If you encounter any issues accessing your pay stubs, please contact the HR department for assistance.
